hook.say: Spartacus is still a streaming hit, 60 years later.
hook.show: Spartacus is still a streaming hit, 60 years later.

lines.say: The 1960 Stanley Kubrick epic remains widely available for rental and purchase.
lines.show: The 1960 Stanley Kubrick epic remains widely available for rental and purchase.

lines.say: It follows enslaved Thracian Spartacus leading a massive revolt against Rome.
lines.show: It follows enslaved Thracian Spartacus leading a massive revolt against Rome.

lines.say: The film was a huge success, winning four Academy Awards.
lines.show: The film was a huge success, winning four Academy Awards.

lines.say: It earned $60 million globally on a $12 million budget.
lines.show: It earned $60 million globally on a $12 million budget.

lines.say: Today, you can rent or buy Spartacus on Amazon, Apple, Google, and YouTube.
lines.show: Today, you can rent or buy Spartacus on Amazon, Apple, Google, and YouTube.

lines.say: Its themes of rebellion and freedom resonate just as powerfully now.
lines.show: Its themes of rebellion and freedom resonate just as powerfully now.

captions.instagram: The 1960 epic 'Spartacus,' directed by Stanley Kubrick, is still a must-watch and widely available for streaming today. With its timeless themes of rebellion and freedom, it's easy to see why this classic continues to captivate audiences decades later. #Spartacus #StanleyKubrick #ClassicFilm #HistoricalDrama #MovieFacts #FilmHistory #StreamingNow #HollywoodClassics #Gladiator #MustWatch
captions.facebook: Did you know the 1960 'Spartacus' film is still a streaming favorite? This Stanley Kubrick classic about rebellion and freedom continues to resonate. Have you watched it recently?

pinterest.title: Spartacus: The 1960 Classic Still a Streaming Hit Today
pinterest.description: Discover why Stanley Kubrick's 'Spartacus' remains a powerful and relevant film over 60 years later. Learn about its critical success, box office triumph, and where you can stream this historical epic today. A must-watch for fans of rebellion and freedom stories!

youtube.title: Spartacus: The 1960 Classic Still Dominates Streaming #Shorts
youtube.description: Stanley Kubrick's 'Spartacus' (1960) remains a streaming hit decades later. Find out why this historical epic about rebellion and freedom continues to captivate audiences and where you can watch it today.

captions.x: The 1960 Stanley Kubrick classic 'Spartacus' is still a major streaming hit decades later. Its themes of rebellion resonate powerfully today. #Spartacus #ClassicFilm

spoken: Spartacus is still a streaming hit, 60 years later. The 1960 Stanley Kubrick epic remains widely available for rental and purchase. It follows enslaved Thracian Spartacus leading a massive revolt against Rome. The film was a huge success, winning four Academy Awards. It earned $60 million globally on a $12 million budget. Today, you can rent or buy Spartacus on Amazon, Apple, Google, and YouTube. Its themes of rebellion and freedom resonate just as powerfully now. Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
